text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Dammit!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! I looooost!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I might've lost, but... but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm not giving up! I'm gonna get<n>stronger!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to win so badly—I ran my<n>heart out! But
Taishin and Hayahide<n>ran their hearts out too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: After all that, I still lost, and that hurts!But it's because it hurts that I'lltrain to get even faster!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll put everything I have into it, even<n>this pain I
feel! I'm going run even<n>fasteeeer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! The Kikuka Sho will be<n>miiiiine!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Ticket... She lost the race of her<n>dreams, but
she's already working<n>toward her next goal.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Her presence is overwhelming...)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket and Taishin have grown<n>tremendously
since fully realizing<n>their abilities...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I must recalculate my strategy right<n>away!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey...

Sure, she didn't win, but she still<n>made it on the
scoreboard. That's an<n>achievement in and of
itself.
Besides...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph. I know.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I refuse to let anyone say things are<n>over for me
just 'cause I lost here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not when I still have the Kikuka Sho to<n>win!

The finale of the Triple Crown tour,<n>the Kikuka Sho,
awaits us next.

She reaffirms her dedication to keep<n>pushing on,
so she can seize the next<n>crown.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I have to win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: As long as I win, then one day...
